overall.description: First-person perspective descending an outdoor escalator through a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis at night. The scene features heavy rain, dense neon-lit skyscrapers, and massive digital billboards characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The camera transitions from a semi-enclosed corridor with advertisements through a dark tunnel before emerging to a panoramic view of the illuminated downtown district.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: beginning descent on escalator with view of SOFTSYS neon tower visible through right-side opening
passing large digital billboards on left wall including All Night Every Night advertisement

agents.ego_description: riding escalator downward while observing illuminated advertisements on the left wall and the neon-lit cityscape through the right-side opening

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with prominent red neon SOFTSYS signage visible through the walkway opening
wall covered with large illuminated digital advertisements including All Night Every Night campaign
black rubber handrail with metallic trim running along the left side
digital advertisement displaying Kiroshi optical implant brand with stylized graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a first-person escalator descent through a semi-enclosed transit walkway. Large digital billboards line the left wall displaying various advertisements, while the right side opens to reveal the iconic SOFTSYS neon tower and the rain-soaked Night City skyline beyond. The environment is sheltered but offers glimpses of the hazy, neon-drenched city atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed escalator tunnel between building structures

events.description: entering dark enclosed tunnel section, visibility drops to near darkness with only dim ambient lighting
approaching tunnel exit, bright neon city lights becoming visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing descent through the dark enclosed tunnel with minimal visibility, anticipating the exit ahead

entered.detail: rough dark concrete walls enclosing the escalator path on both sides

segments.scene_description: The escalator enters a dark, enclosed tunnel section where the bright advertisements and city views are temporarily obscured by rough concrete walls. Visibility is extremely limited with only faint emergency lighting, creating a brief moment of darkness before emerging back into the neon-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transitway with panoramic downtown city views

events.description: emerging from tunnel into open air with expansive panoramic view of Night City skyline
descending past multi-level highway interchange with visible vehicle traffic lights below

agents.ego_description: descending the escalator with an expansive view of the neon-lit skyscrapers and traffic on the streets below, taking in the cyberpunk cityscape

entered.detail: dense cluster of futuristic skyscrapers covered in colorful neon advertisements and signage including the Arasaka tower
curved multi-lane highway with moving vehicle headlights visible through the rain and haze
transparent safety barrier along the right side of the escalator providing unobstructed views

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark tunnel, the scene opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of Night City's downtown district. The camera descends past a complex highway interchange with moving traffic, surrounded by towering skyscrapers illuminated by dense neon signage. The heavy rain and atmospheric haze enhance the cyberpunk aesthetic of the illuminated metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway passing parking structures and building facades

events.description: passing by multi-story concrete parking garage structure on the left
passing large vertical Mix It Up advertisement billboard on the left wall

agents.ego_description: continuing the final descent past parking structures and remaining advertisements, approaching the destination level

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking facility with horizontal slats and illuminated interior levels showing parked vehicles
large vertical digital advertisement displaying a woman in a purple jacket with MIX IT UP text
building facade with distinctive teal and red paneling and metal ventilation grates

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the escalator passing close to urban infrastructure including a multi-story parking garage with visible parked cars and the large Mix It Up advertisement. The teal and red industrial building facade passes by on the right as the descent continues, with the panoramic city views giving way to immediate architectural surroundings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person descent on an escalator that moves from a sheltered transit walkway through a dark void and finally into the heart of a neon-drenched metropolis. It begins by gliding past digital billboards and the glowing SOFTSYS tower, where the rain-soaked skyline is visible through a semi-enclosed corridor. As the escalator enters a dark, enclosed tunnel, the city lights vanish behind rough concrete walls and faint emergency lighting, creating a brief moment of isolation. The scene then opens abruptly into a breathtaking panoramic view of the downtown district, descending past a complex highway interchange and towering skyscrapers shrouded in atmospheric haze. Finally, the perspective shifts from the distant horizon to the immediate urban infrastructure, passing a multi-story parking garage and a teal and red industrial facade featuring a large Mix It Up advertisement.
